title: Add de/en localization keys for import and reconciliation workflow
acceptance_criteria: All import workflow UI labels exist in both German and English
All import error and conflict messages exist in both German and English
Key structure stays consistent between de.json and en.json
deliverables: i18n key mapping updates for csv import flow
completion_summary: Added complete csvImport de/en translation namespace for upload, mapping, reconciliation, conflict resolution, review, confirmation, toasts, and errors with matching key structure.
